name: ASUS ROG Strix B650E-F
description: The ASUS ROG Strix B650E-F Gaming WiFi is an ATX motherboard for AMD's AM5 socket, supporting Ryzen 7000, 8000, and 9000 series processors. It offers a premium, feature-rich base for gaming builds, boasting PCIe 5.0 readiness, DDR5 support, Wi-Fi 6E, and robust VRMs.

name: MSI MAG Z790 Tomahawk WiFi
description: The MSI MAG Z790 Tomahawk WiFi is an ATX motherboard built for 12th, 13th, and 14th Gen Intel processors. It features a robust 16+1+1 power phase design, PCIe 5.0 support, and premium connectivity—including Wi-Fi 6E and a 2.5G LAN—making it a highly reliable foundation for high-end gaming and productivity PCs.
